description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, boxy design. The front facade features large rectangular windows on both floors, a small covered entryway with a black awning, and a sign near the door. The side and rear walls are mostly unadorned, with a few smaller windows and a continuous brick pattern. The back of the house has double doors on the ground floor and a balcony with railings on the upper floor, suggesting access to outdoor space. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a concrete walkway and a small patch of grass in front. Utility boxes and a mailbox are visible near the entrance, adding to the urban residential feel.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with large windows, a flat roof, and a covered entryway. The rear features a balcony and double doors, while the front has a small lawn and utility boxes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a black awning, large windows, utility boxes, a mailbox, and a small lawn.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain brick wall with minimal windows and a continuous brick pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting double doors on the ground floor, a balcony with railings above, and several windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of large and small windows and a clear view of the house's depth.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a black awning, single door, small porch, and adjacent utility boxes
